title: Usopp Wins His Own Way
description: On pages 18–18, usopp wins his own way focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.
scene: On pages 18–18, usopp wins his own way focuses on Usopp, Chew, Nami, Arlong as usopp is forced into a one-on-one fight against Chew and struggles between fear, lies, and real courage.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Did you know that alcohol is flammable!?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
